description_long: This object is a classic American-style hot dog, nestled in a soft, sesame-seeded bun and served in a paper tray with a red-and-white checkered pattern. The sausage is topped with a generous swirl of bright yellow mustard and several slices of green pickles, adding both color and texture. The bun appears fluffy and lightly browned, with visible sesame seeds scattered across its surface. The sausage itself is plump and reddish-brown, peeking out from both ends of the bun. The paper tray is slightly crimped at the edges, providing support and preventing the hot dog from rolling. The overall presentation is appetizing and typical of street food vendors or park concession stands.
description: A plump hot dog in a sesame bun, topped with mustard and pickles, served in a red-and-white paper tray.
description_view_0: Front view showing the hot dog head-on, with mustard, pickles, and the round end of the sausage clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bun, the sausage, and the arrangement of pickles and mustard along the top.
description_view_2: Rear view similar to the front, with the opposite end of the sausage and condiments visible, and the tray's shape more apparent.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, showing the bun's sesame seeds, the sausage, and the paper tray's crimped edge.
